scripts.build:win:
electron-builder --win && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const crypto=require('crypto');const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf-8'));const v=pkg.version;const date=new Date().toISOString();const nsisExe='Idpetos Setup '+v+'.exe';const portableExe='Idpetos '+v+'.exe';const nsisPath=path.join('dist',nsisExe);const portablePath=path.join('dist',portableExe);const sha512=(f)=>crypto.createHash('sha512').update(fs.readFileSync(f)).digest('hex');let nsisSize='',portableSize='',nsisSha='',portableSha='';try{nsisSize=fs.statSync(nsisPath).size.toString();nsisSha=sha512(nsisPath);}catch(e){}try{portableSize=fs.statSync(portablePath).size.toString();portableSha=sha512(portablePath);}catch(e){}const yml='version: '+v+'
releaseDate: "'+date+'"
files:
  - url: '+nsisExe+'
    size: '+nsisSize+'
    sha512: '+nsisSha+'
  - url: '+portableExe+'
    size: '+portableSize+'
    sha512: '+portableSha+'
path: '+nsisExe+'
sha512: '+nsisSha+'
';if(!fs.existsSync('dist'))fs.mkdirSync('dist');fs.writeFileSync('dist/latest.yml',yml);console.log('Generated dist/latest.yml');"
scripts.build:mac:
electron-builder --mac && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const crypto=require('crypto');const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf-8'));const v=pkg.version;const date=new Date().toISOString();const dmgFile='Idpetos-'+v+'.dmg';const zipFile='Idpetos-'+v+'.zip';const sha512=(f)=>crypto.createHash('sha512').update(fs.readFileSync(f)).digest('hex');let dmgSize='',dmgSha='',zipSize='',zipSha='';try{dmgSize=fs.statSync('dist/'+dmgFile).size.toString();dmgSha=sha512('dist/'+dmgFile);}catch(e){console.log('DMG not found:',e.message);}try{zipSize=fs.statSync('dist/'+zipFile).size.toString();zipSha=sha512('dist/'+zipFile);}catch(e){console.log('ZIP not found:',e.message);}const yml='version: '+v+'
releaseDate: "'+date+'"
files:
'+(dmgSize?'  - url: '+dmgFile+'
    size: '+dmgSize+'
    sha512: '+dmgSha+'
':'')+(zipSize?'  - url: '+zipFile+'
    size: '+zipSize+'
    sha512: '+zipSha+'
':'')+'path: '+dmgFile+'
sha512: '+dmgSha+'
';fs.writeFileSync('dist/latest.yml',yml);console.log('Generated dist/latest.yml for macOS');console.log('DMG:',dmgFile,'Size:',dmgSize);console.log('ZIP:',zipFile,'Size:',zipSize);"
